description.ru: Assets, adversaries, trust boundaries и residual risks.
description.en: Assets, adversaries, trust boundaries and residual risks.

ru: Unauthenticated network clients, malicious members и privilege escalation.
Removed/banned users, compromised/revoked devices и stale subscriptions.
Replay, scope substitution, races и resource abuse.
MIME spoofing, malicious attachments, XSS/dependency compromise.
Update/installer substitution, secret leakage и Cloud/provider integration errors.
en: Unauthenticated network clients, malicious members and privilege escalation.
Removed/banned users, compromised/revoked devices and stale subscriptions.
Replay, scope substitution, races and resource abuse.
MIME spoofing, malicious attachments, XSS/dependency compromise.
Update/installer substitution, secret leakage and Cloud/provider integration errors.

ru: Authenticated session.
Matching Origin и valid CSRF для browser mutation.
Resource existence и membership.
Role/permission.
Active ban/restriction.
Room policy.
Input scope/runtime validation.
Rate/resource limit.
en: Authenticated session.
Matching Origin and valid CSRF for browser mutations.
Resource existence and membership.
Role/permission.
Active ban/restriction.
Room policy.
Input scope/runtime validation.
Rate/resource limit.

text.ru: Trust mutations дополнительно требуют X-Nexora-Device-ID, active/verified device и scoped challenge/signature. Active ban имеет приоритет над stale membership.
text.en: Trust mutations additionally require X-Nexora-Device-ID, an active/verified device and a scoped challenge/signature. An active ban overrides stale membership.

text.ru: Защита plaintext от compromised authorized Client, восстановление после полной потери private state, metadata confidentiality, independent certification и high-risk suitability unsigned prerelease.
text.en: Plaintext protection from a compromised authorised Client, recovery after total private-state loss, metadata confidentiality, independent certification and high-risk suitability of an unsigned prerelease.

description.ru: Secrets, audit, retention, incident handling и release integrity.
description.en: Secrets, audit, retention, incident handling and release integrity.

ru: Tokens, passwords, cookies, TOTP/recovery codes, invite codes и private keys не попадают в logs/audit.
Request IDs и recursive credential redaction используются для diagnostics.
Trust audit принимает action-specific primitive allowlists, не arbitrary nested metadata.
en: Tokens, passwords, cookies, TOTP/recovery codes, invite codes and private keys never enter logs/audit.
Request IDs and recursive credential redaction are used for diagnostics.
Trust audit accepts action-specific primitive allowlists, not arbitrary nested metadata.

text.ru: Startup и hourly maintenance очищают expired sessions, login history старше 90 дней, stale rate-limit buckets, expired Trust challenges/KeyPackages, pending uploads и orphan storage по policy.
text.en: Startup and hourly maintenance remove expired sessions, login history older than 90 days, stale rate-limit buckets, expired Trust challenges/KeyPackages, pending uploads and orphan storage according to policy.

ru: Зафиксируйте version/tag/commit, Server ID, request IDs и timestamps.
Соберите sanitized logs без content/secrets.
Ограничьте write access или revoke compromised device/credential.
Сохраните evidence и определите data/security impact.
Добавьте regression test, correction, migration/rollback и remaining risk.
en: Record version/tag/commit, Server ID, request IDs and timestamps.
Collect sanitised logs without content/secrets.
Restrict writes or revoke the compromised device/credential.
Preserve evidence and determine data/security impact.
Add a regression test, correction, migration/rollback and remaining risk.

description.ru: Rate limiting, resource ceilings и безопасный error contract.
description.en: Rate limiting, resource ceilings and a safe error contract.

text.ru: Trust, recovery и E2EE routes используют bounded sliding-window limiter. HTTP 429 возвращает stable code RATE_LIMITED и Retry-After. Ceilings проверяются до или внутри atomic transaction.
text.en: Trust, recovery and E2EE routes use a bounded sliding-window limiter. HTTP 429 returns stable code RATE_LIMITED and Retry-After. Ceilings are checked before or inside an atomic transaction.

ru: Различайте AUTH_REQUIRED, PERMISSION_DENIED, RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND, CONFLICT, VALIDATION_FAILED, ROOM_BANNED и временные errors.
Не раскрывайте stack, SQL, tokens, filesystem paths или internal object dumps.
en: Distinguish AUTH_REQUIRED, PERMISSION_DENIED, RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND, CONFLICT, VALIDATION_FAILED, ROOM_BANNED and temporary errors.
Never expose stack traces, SQL, tokens, filesystem paths or internal object dumps.
